subject: Hello from OZ
body:
Just land it down under :-)
Was thinking of U!!! Tell me how R U?
I'm in peace, balanced and filled with joy and love as I haven't been for loong time!!! 
:-)
Tell me......
Lots of love, light and happiness,
Petra
